2604.00979.title: Dual Optimal: Make Your LLM Peer-like with Dignity
2604.00979.paper_summary: Current aligned language models exhibit a dual failure mode we term the Evasive Servant: they sycophantically validate flawed user beliefs while deflecting responsibility with boilerplate disclaimers. We propose the Dignified Peer framework, which counters servility with anti-sycophancy and trustworthiness, and mitigates evasiveness through empathy and creativity. Realizing this agent requires overcoming significant challenges in data supervision, objective collapse, and evaluation bias. We address these issues by introducing the PersonaKnob dataset which features a compositional partial order structure of multiple persona preference. This data is utilized alongside a tolerant constrained Lagrangian DPO algorithm that dynamically balances all persona dimensions to prevent behavioral collapse. Additionally, we employ a psychometrically calibrated Item Response Theory evaluation protocol to disentangle latent model persona capability from confounders like judge biases. Extensive empirical studies demonstrate that our approach successfully build a LLM agent with both dignity and peer.
2604.00979.paper_summary_zh: 目前對齊的語言模型顯示出一種我們稱之為「逃避僕人」的雙重失敗模式：它們諂媚地驗證有缺陷的用戶信念，同時用標準的免責聲明來推卸責任。<lb/>我們提出了「尊嚴同儕」框架，該框架通過反諂媚和可信度來對抗奴性，並通過同理心和創造力來減輕逃避行為。<lb/>實現這一代理需要克服數據監督、目標崩潰和評估偏見等重大挑戰。<lb/>我們通過引入PersonaKnob數據集來解決這些問題，該數據集具有多重角色偏好的組合部分順序結構。<lb/>這些數據與一種寬容的約束拉格朗日DPO算法一起使用，該算法動態平衡所有角色維度，以防止行為崩潰。<lb/>此外，我們採用心理測量校準的項目反應理論評估協議，以將潛在模型角色能力與評判者偏見等混淆因素分開。<lb/>大量實證研究表明，我們的方法成功構建了一個具有尊嚴和同儕特質的LLM代理。
2604.00979.author: Xiangqi Wang et.al.
2604.00979.authors: Xiangqi Wang, Yue Huang, Haomin Zhuang, Kehan Guo, Xiangliang Zhang
